button.primary: bg-[#FFD600] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#F0C800] border-none font-medium px-6 py-3 transition-colors rounded-none flex items-center justify-center gap-2
button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-6 py-3 transition-colors rounded-none flex items-center justify-center gap-2
button.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#A1A1AA] hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors rounded-none flex items-center justify-center gap-2

input.base: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-[#71717A] focus:border-[#FFD600] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FFD600] rounded-none py-3 px-4 w-full transition-all

chat_bubble.user: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-white/10 text-white p-4 max-w-[90%] md:max-w-[80%] self-end
chat_bubble.ai: bg-transparent text-[#A1A1AA] p-4 max-w-[100%] md:max-w-[90%] self-start border-l-2 border-[#FFD600] pl-6

terminal_log.container: bg-[#050505] border border-white/10 p-4 mt-2 font-mono text-xs md:text-sm text-[#4ADE80] overflow-x-auto

surface.card: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4

login_bg.usage: Background image for the authentication screen. Must use an overlay like bg-black/80 to ensure text readability.

bot_avatar.usage: Avatar representing the OpenClaw AI assistant in the chat interface and header.

iconography.instructions: Use lucide-react icons. For terminal/execution states, use the Terminal icon. For voice mode, use Mic/MicOff icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a PWA. The application MUST be mobile-first and responsive. The chat history sidebar should be placed inside a Shadcn Sheet component on mobile viewports, and act as a fixed sidebar (aside) on desktop.
The UI is built on a dark 'Swiss & High-Contrast' aesthetic. Override all Shadcn default rounded corners with `rounded-none`. Rely on strict 1px borders (`border-white/10`) and flat surfaces.
Add 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts to your index.html. Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for terminal logs/skill execution.
The chat interface should have the text input pinned to the bottom of the screen. Include a prominent 'Modo Mãos Livres' (Voice Mode) button near the input to toggle STT/TTS hands-free mode.
When the AI is executing a system skill (e.g., cron jobs, file management), show a terminal-like block (`terminal_log` style) inside the AI message bubble to represent the skill execution status.

The 'Painel de Habilidades' (Skills Dashboard) should be a separate view or a large modal that lists the agent's capabilities (Browser Automation, File Management, System Commands, etc.) with toggles or status indicators showing if they are active.
Translate the entire interface to Portuguese BR (pt-BR) as per the i18n specifications.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='send-message-btn', data-testid='voice-mode-toggle').
The Settings Panel should allow configuring the local LLM connection (Ollama URL).
Implement multiple user support with authentication screen. Use the provided login_bg image.
